evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; r.mosCargado=(typeof MOS!=='undefined'); r.fnCurvas=typeof MOS.abrirModalPrecioCurvas==='function'; r.fnPaso2=typeof MOS.guardarCostosYPaso2==='function'; r.fnCosto=typeof MOS._costoDerivado==='function'; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); MOS.abrirModalPrecioCurvas('IDPRO0001147'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); r.modalCurvas=!!document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal'); r.tieneChart=!!document.getElementById('pcCurvasChart'); r.precioInput=(document.getElementById('pcPrecio')||{}).value; r.margenInput=(document.getElementById('pcMargen')||{}).value; return r; })()
